title: Full Stack Developer
job_type_tags:
On-site
Matches your job preferences, workplace type is On-site.
description:
About the job
Job Description:
Develop and maintain web applications using .NET and React.js.
Design and implement RESTful APIs and integrate them with frontend components.
Collaborate with UIUX designers to create responsive and user friendly interfaces.
Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code following best practices.
Perform unit testing and participate in code reviews.
Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance.
Work closely with cross functional teams to deliver high quality software solutions.

Must Have Skills: 
Hands-on experience with .NET and React.js
Strong proficiency in C#, ASP.NET Core, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 and Entity Framework.
Experience with RESTful APIs and JSON.
Familiarity with SQL Server and database design.
Knowledge of Git or other version control systems.
Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies

Nice to Have Skills:
 Experience with Azure or AWS cloud services.
Knowledge of TypeScript and Redux.
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices.
